notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
E006 cost-6 starter: copied from E005 access starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6.
E007 damage-cap starter: copied from E006 cost-6 starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap.
Replay 001: P1 opened by claiming the northeast center and staging the scout for the east lane.
Replay 002: P2 answered on the west-south center and advanced both support units behind the scouts.
Replay 003: P1 took the east center and moved the raider toward center-north.
Replay 004: P2 claimed center-south and formed a second scout screen.
Replay 005: P1 captured center-north and recruited a second raider.
Replay 006: P2 took the center and recruited a guardian screen.
Replay 007: P1 removed the first center screen but did not flip center-center.
Replay 008: P2 reoccupied the center with the second scout and recruited a healer.
Replay 009: P1 killed the second center screen and took southeast, but saved supply instead of recruiting.
Replay 010: P2 recruited another scout and compacted around the remaining centers.
Replay 011: P1 damaged the druid and recruited a guardian, but still delayed the center flip.
Replay 012: P2 healed the wounded druid slightly and recruited a second druid.
Replay 013: P1 finally flipped center-center and recruited another marksman.
Replay 014: P2 could not retake the occupied center but damaged the guardian holding it.
Replay 015: P1 recruited a healer and wounded the marksman without taking another kill.
Replay 016: P2 recruited a guardian and kept the damaged marksman alive.
Replay 017: P1 killed the damaged marksman and recruited two fast bodies.
